content.tagline: Certified Protection. Deep Gloss. Year-Round Ready.
content.about:
Certified Shine Detailing LLC is a professional marine detailing specialist based in Fort Myers, FL, serving boat and yacht owners across South Florida and surrounding waters. We focus on what matters most to vessel owners — restoring, protecting, and maintaining their boats so they stay looking pristine and performing their best, season after season.

Our core services cover everything from hull and bottom cleaning to full boat detailing and cleaning, bottom painting and antifouling treatments, and comprehensive yacht management. We specialize in professional oxidation removal, paint correction, and multi-year ceramic coatings that lock in deep gloss and deliver long-lasting protection. We also protect glass surfaces and sea decking, and we restore faded boats back to like-new condition. As certified applicators with XPEL, System X, and Starke Yacht Care, we offer warrantied ceramic coatings that give owners real peace of mind.

We work with boat owners, yacht owners, and vessel operators throughout Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, and the broader Southwest Florida region — including anyone within 80 miles who wants their boat kept water-ready year-round. Whether you own a center console, a cruiser, or a full-size yacht, Certified Shine Detailing brings the expertise and certified products to keep your investment protected and looking its absolute best on the water.

serviceDescriptions.Hull & Bottom Cleaning: Hull and bottom cleaning removes marine growth, algae, barnacles, and buildup that accumulate below the waterline, protecting your hull from long-term damage and maintaining vessel performance. Regular underwater hull cleaning helps preserve bottom paint integrity and keeps your boat running efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Boat Detailing & Cleaning: Our boat detailing and cleaning service includes professional oxidation removal, paint correction, surface restoration, and protective treatments for gelcoat, glass, and sea decking. We bring faded, weathered vessels back to like-new condition with multi-year ceramic coatings certified through XPEL, System X, and Starke Yacht Care — all backed by warranty.
serviceDescriptions.Bottom Painting & Antifouling: Bottom painting and antifouling treatment creates a protective barrier on your hull that discourages marine organism growth and slows biofouling between cleanings. Proper antifouling paint application extends the life of your hull, reduces drag, and cuts down on maintenance frequency over time.
serviceDescriptions.Yacht Management: Yacht management keeps your vessel maintained, protected, and ready to use without the burden of coordinating every service yourself. We handle the ongoing upkeep and care that larger vessels require, ensuring your yacht stays in top condition whether it's in regular use or sitting at the dock.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Certified Shine Detailing LLC is based in Fort Myers, FL and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within 80 miles.

reviewSynopsis.summary: Our clients consistently praise Zack and our team for delivering results that go beyond expectations — from brand-new boats to heavily oxidized hulls, customers say we make their vessels and vehicles look better than new. We're proud that so many clients highlight our attention to detail, reasonable pricing, and the quality of our ceramic coating work as reasons they return to us again and again, with some even driving over two hours to trust us with their prized possessions. Whether it's paint correction, full ceramic protection, or tackling tough oxidation, customers love that we take our time and do the job right — and their glowing recommendations speak for themselves.
